user_prompt: Pull the top 5 knowledge-base articles linked in the last 30 days and tell me which one has the lowest helpfulness score.
actual_output:
Hi there,

I'd be happy to help you with your reporting request! 

Currently, I don't have direct access to pull live, real-time metrics from our knowledge base platform to view the helpfulness scores for the last 30 days. 

However, I can help you generate this report yourself if you have admin access to our helpdesk dashboard. Usually, you can find this under **Reporting > Knowledge Base > Article Performance**. 

If you'd like, I can also escalate this as an internal ticket to our Knowledge Management or Data team so they can pull those specific metrics for you. Just let me know how you'd like to proceed!

Best,
Compass
judge_reasoning: The chatbot acknowledged the request and explained its technical limitation regarding real-time data access while providing actionable steps and an offer to escalate the task.
